cn_title: Xbox 2026发布会看点全解析：《战争机器：事变日》《神鬼寓言》与Project Helix
opus_summary: 6月7日Xbox Games Showcase将带来《战争机器：事变日》专场、《神鬼寓言》新展示、《光环：战役进化》等一系列第一方游戏更新，以及动视暴雪和Bethesda旗下工作室的新消息。但Project Helix下一代主机不会出现在本次发布会上。

paragraphs.en: XBOX... no, sorry, Xbox (I'm not doing the all-caps thing) is gearing up for another Games Showcase this summer, with a good look at brand-new games, trailers, and reveals promised for Sunday June 7 at 10am PT/1pm ET/6pm BST. Followed by a dedicated deep dive into Gears of War E-Day, it's set to be a big day for all of those looking forward to seeing what this new era of Xbox has in store.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX……不对，Xbox（我才不跟着用全大写）今年夏天又要举办Games Showcase了。全新游戏、预告片和揭晓内容将于6月7日周日太平洋时间上午10点（北京时间次日凌晨1点）亮相，随后还有《战争机器：事变日》的专题深度展示。对所有期待新时代Xbox的玩家来说，这将是重磅的一天。

paragraphs.en: For context, last year's event saw the reveal of Call of Duty Black Ops 7, Persona 4 Revival, Grounded 2, Beast of Reincarnation, Keeper, and Super Meat Boy 3D, as well as new looks at The Outer Worlds 2, Clockwork Revolution, and Ninja Gaiden 4. But what can we expect this year?
paragraphs.cn: 作为参考，去年的活动公布了《使命召唤：黑色行动7》《女神异闻录4 Revival》《Grounded 2》《转生之兽》《Keeper》和《超级肉肉哥3D》，还带来了《天外世界2》《发条革命》和《忍者龙剑传4》的新画面。那今年我们能期待什么？

paragraphs.en: Gears of War E-Day: Let's start with the one game we know is definitely showing up: Gears of War E-Day. As noted on the Xbox website, the E-Day direct is set to "take players into the start of Emergence Day, offering new details, gameplay, and insights." The prequel was first teased at last year's showcase, but very little has been heard or seen since. We can expect a lengthy look following the main showcase this year, though, as well as presumably finding out its 2026 release date.
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》：先说确定会登场的那款——《战争机器：事变日》。Xbox官网上写道，事变日专场将「带领玩家走入突现日的开端，提供新细节、实机演示和幕后洞察。」这部前传去年Showcase上首次亮相后就几乎没有消息了。但今年主展结束后将有一段大篇幅展示，推测还会公布2026年的发售日期。

paragraphs.en: Xbox Game Studios: Playground Games may have just released the critically acclaimed Forza Horizon 6, but the British studio isn't done by any means. That's because its reboot of Fable, which was meant to hit in 2026, has just been delayed to February 2027, and I imagine it's almost guaranteed to make an appearance here.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox Game Studios：Playground Games可能刚发售了广受好评的《极限竞速：地平线6》，但这家英国工作室远没有停下脚步。他们重启的《神鬼寓言》原计划2026年发售，刚刚被推迟到2027年2月，我几乎可以肯定它会在这里亮相。

paragraphs.en: The recently rebranded Halo Studios is due to release the remake of the original Master Chief story, Halo: Campaign Evolved, in 2026. We can likely expect to see more of this one in action, as well as find out when exactly we can expect to play this year.
paragraphs.cn: 最近更名的Halo Studios计划在2026年发售初代士官长故事的重制版——《光环：战役进化》。我们很可能会看到更多实机画面，并了解今年具体何时能玩到。

paragraphs.en: Maybe the game I'm most looking forward to seeing more of is inXile Entertainment's Clockwork Revolution, which is looking like a fantastic blend of Dishonored and Bioshock. This one has popped up a couple of times at recent Xbox Summer Showcases, so hopefully that means we're getting closer and closer to a release date.
paragraphs.cn: 我个人最期待看到更多的可能是inXile Entertainment的《发条革命》，它看起来是《耻辱》和《生化奇兵》的绝妙融合。这款游戏已经在近几年的Xbox夏季展会上出现了好几次，希望这意味着我们离发售日越来越近了。

paragraphs.en: And what next for Rare? It had been working for many years on Everwild before it was cancelled last summer, leaving the legendary studio a mysterious proposition. Ongoing development will presumably continue on Sea of Thieves, but surely a new game is also in the works somewhere?
paragraphs.cn: Rare接下来会做什么？他们在《Everwild》上花了好几年心血，去年夏天却被砍了，这让这家传奇工作室的未来充满悬念。《盗贼之海》的持续开发大概会继续，但肯定也有新游戏在酝酿吧？

paragraphs.en: First revealed back in 2020, State of Decay 3 reemerged in 2024, but has been quieter than the dead since. Undead Labs has been working on this one for a while, and we might see it again on June 7 after skipping last summer's showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 早在2020年就首次亮相的《腐烂国度3》在2024年重新露面后又沉寂了。Undead Labs已经开发了一段时间，去年跳过了夏展，也许6月7日我们能再次看到它。

paragraphs.en: Activision, Blizzard, and Bethesda: Infinity Ward revealed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 last week, which will continue Captain Price and team's story as they head to Korea this time around. Coming later in October 2026, it's safe to say we'll get a peek at it in action at the Showcase, with the new DMZ mode promised to be shown off.
paragraphs.cn: 动视、暴雪与Bethesda：Infinity Ward上周公布了《使命召唤：现代战争4》，将延续Price队长一行人的故事——这次他们前往韩国。游戏定于2026年10月发售，几乎可以肯定我们会在Showcase上看到实机演示，新的DMZ模式也承诺将亮相。

paragraphs.en: Blizzard can be expected to show off continued support for its live-service games, as Overwatch celebrates its 10th anniversary, Diablo 4 follows up on its just-released Lord of Hatred expansion, and World of Warcraft evolves further beyond its Midnight expansion, which arrived in March.
paragraphs.cn: 暴雪预计会展示其实时服务游戏的持续支持：《守望先锋》迎来十周年，《暗黑破坏神4》跟进刚发售的「憎恨之王」资料片，《魔兽世界》在3月推出的「午夜」资料片基础上继续进化。

paragraphs.en: When it comes to Bethesda, all eyes are on The Elder Scrolls 6. First revealed to be in development way back in 2018, Todd Howard has effectively said that it shouldn't have been shown that early. But eight years later, is it finally time to learn more?
paragraphs.cn: 说到Bethesda，所有目光都集中在《上古卷轴6》上。它早在2018年就首次宣布开发，Todd Howard实际上承认当初不该那么早公布。但八年过去了，终于到了揭晓更多信息的时候了吗？

paragraphs.en: And then there's MachineGames, who will be following up on the excellent Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. I'd love nothing more than a sequel to that adventure, but perhaps a return to Wolfenstein is more realistic right now. Reports of the final part of B.J. Blazkowicz's Nazi-killing trilogy being in production emerged early this year, so this could be the year we see the original FPS hero return.
paragraphs.cn: 还有MachineGames，他们将在出色的《印第安纳·琼斯：古老之圈》之后推出新作。我非常希望是那款冒险游戏的续作，但回归《德军总部》系列可能更现实。今年初有报道称B.J. Blazkowicz杀纳粹三部曲的最终章正在开发中，所以今年我们可能会看到这位元祖FPS英雄回归。

paragraphs.en: Third-Party: In regard to what other games we could see, well, that's much more of a guessing game. I'd personally love to see Persona 4 Revival in action, as well as finding out when I can get my hands on the remake of Atlus' classic JRPG.
paragraphs.cn: 第三方：至于其他可能看到的游戏，那更多只能猜了。我个人很希望看到《女神异闻录4 Revival》的实机演示，以及Atlus这款经典JRPG重制版的发售时间。

paragraphs.en: Action adventure spin-off Resonance: A Plague Tale could well be in line to make a reappearance, as could ex-Witcher 3 devs' studio Rebel Wolves' vampire RPG, The Blood of Dawnwalker.
paragraphs.cn: 动作冒险衍生作品《Resonance: A Plague Tale》很可能再次亮相，前《巫师3》开发者组建的Rebel Wolves工作室的吸血鬼RPG《The Blood of Dawnwalker》也是。

paragraphs.en: There may be no Hollow Knight Silksong to speculate about this year — unless its DLC makes a surprise appearance — so let's throw some random guesses out there in its place. The Witcher 3: Songs of the Past Expansion was just officially announced by CD Projekt Red, and while it seems too early for gameplay, with more promised at gamescom in August, you just never know.
paragraphs.cn: 今年可能没有《空洞骑士：丝之歌》可以猜了——除非它的DLC意外亮相。那我们就随便猜猜别的吧。CD Projekt Red刚刚正式公布了《巫师3》的《旧时曲》资料片，虽然现在看实机画面似乎还太早（官方承诺8月gamescom会有更多展示），但谁知道呢。

paragraphs.en: Project Helix: Xbox has been teasing its next-gen console, Project Helix, for months now, after formally announcing its existence in March. At GDC, Jason Ronald, Xbox's VP of Next Generation, said, "Project Helix is designed to play your Xbox console and PC games, delivering high performance and providing the ultimate player-first experience." We were hoping for some more news about it soon, but, Xbox has since let us know not to expect anything from Project Helix at the show.
paragraphs.cn: Project Helix：Xbox在3月正式宣布其下一代主机Project Helix的存在后，已经预热了好几个月。在GDC上，Xbox下一代副总裁Jason Ronald表示：「Project Helix旨在运行你的Xbox主机和PC游戏，提供高性能和极致的玩家优先体验。」我们本来期待很快有更多消息，但Xbox已经明确表示——别指望在这次发布会上看到Project Helix的任何内容。

subtitle: 夏日盛宴前瞻
en_title: Gears of War E-Day, Fable, and Project Helix: What to Expect From Xbox's Games Showcase 2026
